news.t: First Trust Lists June Series of Target Outcome Buffer ETFs Based on QQQ and EFA

overview.description: The FT Vest Nasdaq-100 Buffer ETF - June (QJUN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on QQQ ETF over a specific holding period. The actively-managed fund holds options and collateral. QJUN was launched on Jun 18, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.

data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”) a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager announced today that it has expanded its suite of Target Out...
